summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ELS MHD Step 05 - Transportuebersicht. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all core functionality including Transport list, KPI tiles, intern/extern columns, status buckets, ResourceAssignDialog, NewTransportDialog, status transitions (Abfahrt/Abschliessen), ResourceBar with drop targets, and Auto-Create transport on patient.transport_typ. Fixed cascade delete bug for transports when incident is deleted.
seed_data_creation: Created test transports during testing. Test incident TEST_Step05_Transport_Incident was created and cleaned up by pytest. P-0002 transport was created via Patient-Detail Transport-Anforderung flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 05 fully tested. Backend: Transport CRUD endpoints work correctly, Auto-Create on patient.transport_typ verified, Auto-Complete on patient status (entlassen/uebergeben) verified, Cascade delete on incident verified (fixed bug - added db.transports.delete_many), filtering by typ and status works. Frontend: TransportList page (/transport) works with all data-testid attributes: transport-list-title, transport-no-incident, kpi-tr-total, kpi-tr-offen, kpi-tr-zugewiesen, kpi-tr-unterwegs, kpi-tr-intern, kpi-tr-extern, transport-col-intern, transport-col-extern, bucket-offen, bucket-zugewiesen, bucket-unterwegs, bucket-abgeschlossen, resource-bar, resource-bar-new-transport, resource-drop-* (9 targets), resource-assign-dialog, resource-assign-opt-*, new-transport-dialog, nt-typ, nt-ziel, nt-res, nt-submit, nt-cancel, transport-card-*, transport-refresh, transport-new. QuickEntryBar positioning fix verified (S0 button has >180px margin from right edge). Existing demo incident MANV-Uebung Sued (712ca18e) has 3 transports: P-0001 (intern, abgeschlossen), P-0002 (extern, offen), and one without patient (extern, offen).

backend: GET /api/meta returns version 0.5.0 and step '05 – Transportuebersicht'
POST /api/incidents/{id}/transports with ressource -> status=zugewiesen, zugewiesen_at set
POST with patient_id copies patient_kennung and patient_sichtung
PATCH /api/transports/{id} with ressource='RTW 1' sets status=zugewiesen (if offen)
Auto-Create: PATCH patient with transport_typ=intern creates Transport (status=offen, patient_kennung+patient_sichtung copied)
Auto-Create: PATCH patient with transport_typ=extern creates Transport with ziel=rd
Auto-Complete: PATCH patient with status=entlassen sets transports to abgeschlossen
Auto-Complete: PATCH patient with status=uebergeben sets transports to abgeschlossen
Cascade: DELETE incident removes associated transports (BUG FIXED)
frontend: Navigation to /transport WITHOUT active incident shows 'Kein Incident aktiv' (transport-no-incident)
6 KPI tiles: kpi-tr-total, kpi-tr-offen, kpi-tr-zugewiesen, kpi-tr-unterwegs, kpi-tr-intern, kpi-tr-extern
4 buckets per column: bucket-offen, bucket-zugewiesen, bucket-unterwegs, bucket-abgeschlossen
Transport-Card shows Kennung, Sichtung-Badge, Ziel, Ressource (or '— fehlt'), Dauer
Card-Action 'Ressource ...' opens ResourceAssignDialog with options per typ (5 extern options)
After assignment, Card moves to 'Zugewiesen' bucket
'Abfahrt' button sets status=unterwegs (Card moves to 'Unterwegs' bucket)
'Abschliessen' button sets status=abgeschlossen (Card moves to 'Abgeschlossen' bucket)
ResourceBar (resource-bar) sticky at bottom with 9 drop targets (4 intern + 5 extern)
ResourceBar shows count badge on occupied resources
NewTransportDialog (new-transport-dialog) with typ/ziel/res selects and Anlegen button
Patient-Detail Transport-Anforderung creates Transport entry (verified with P-0002)
QuickEntryBar-Fix: S1/S2/S3/S0 + Detail-Erfassung centered; S0 button has >180px margin from right edge (724px verified)

bugs_fixed.issue: Cascade delete for transports missing when incident is deleted
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'await db.transports.delete_many({"incident_id": incident_id})' to delete_incident endpoint
